title: Send message to UI alignment agent

log.context: Send message to UI alignment agent

There is no "SendMessage" tool available to contact background agents directly. The available tools here are Discord reply, Graphiti memory, Chrome browser tools, and task management — none of which send messages to a specific agent thread by ID.

To relay this message to agent `aeb42ad892a87dbb8`, the options are:
